{{Infobox group
| name = Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Witnesses are members of a [[Guild]] responsible for the preservation, recording, and distribution of historical accounts. They serve as neutral observers during significant events, such as the official appointment of an [[Imperial]] heir or major military conflicts. For example, a [[Witness]] named [[Heliora]] was known to record the maneuvers of generals during the [[Kings' War]]. To ensure their neutrality is verified, they often operate in pairs consisting of a [[Chronicler]], who carries a belt of wax candles, and a [[Silent One]], who remains quiet and is heavily armed. Their testimony carries significant weight in legal or political matters, such as confirming allegations of treason or secret alliances.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A pair of members from the Witnesses, an [[Imperial]] [[Guild]], approached [[Calder]] with a request to transport them to an [[island]] for the retrieval of a relic. During their interaction with [[Calder]] and [[Andel]], the group maintained a firm hold on their weapons and appeared visibly exhausted. Although [[Calder]] had prior experience dealing with this group, it was noted that the Witnesses have a history of working alongside the [[Blackwatch]]. The guild possesses the unique ability to relive recorded memories through the burning of specific candles, and they were seen being attended to by [[Guards]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A pair of Witnesses wants to hire [[Calder]] to take them to an [[island]] and withdraw a relic.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Witnesses are a group that [[Calder]] and [[Andel]] are interacting with.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has past experience with Witnesses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Witnesses kept a tight grip on their weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Witnesses are one of the [[Imperial Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Witnesses are tired.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Witnesses are a group that has worked with the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Witnesses can relive recorded memories by burning specific candles.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Guards]] are serving the Witnesses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses serve as investigative tools capable of verifying or denying the accuracy of any news report. Within the Palace, a pair of these entities is stationed at the dungeon checkpoint. Their influence extends to public discourse, as seen when they published an article exonerating the [[Imperialist Guilds]] for attacks carried out in the name of justice. Additionally, they are responsible for issuing the formal public declaration regarding the dissolution of the [[Champions]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses can be used to investigate news reports.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses can verify or deny any story put out.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Palace dungeon]] checkpoint includes a pair of Witnesses.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses published an article exonerating the [[Imperialist Guilds]] for attacks conducted in pursuit of justice.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses are responsible for issuing the public declaration of the [[Champions]]' dissolution.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Andel]] is looking for a position with the Witnesses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Witnesses can provide testimony regarding the actions of [[Regents]] and the [[Imperial Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Witnesses are silently observing.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“So we still don’t know anything about our mysterious Witnesses.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witnesses had published an article in the news-sheets exonerating the Imperialist Guilds for “any attacks they may conduct in the pursuit of justice.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
